mapper.insert: insert into kh_disease_content (disease_id, name, language, symptoms, need_extract, article_source, create_time, update_time) values (#{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{language,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{symptoms,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{needExtract,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{articleSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update kh_disease_content set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, language = #{language,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, symptoms = #{symptoms,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, need_extract = #{needExtract,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, article_source = #{articleSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where disease_id = #{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select disease_id, name, language, symptoms, need_extract, article_source, create_time, update_time from kh_disease_content where disease_id = #{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select disease_id, name, language, symptoms, need_extract, article_source, create_time, update_time from kh_disease_content
